questions.question: Lin-Manuel Miranda co-wrote many of the songs for this instant Disney classic in 2016.
What line of e-readers was launched by Amazon in 2007?
Name the singer to debut a top 10 lead single from each of her first three albums: Yours Truly, My Everything, and Dangerous Woman.
What NFL player was blackballed from playing as a result of kneeling during the national anthem in protest of racial inequality?
This was the Gen Z word that meant you totally dominated a performance. (Legends like Beyonce did it all day.)
